text:
There was a girl named Fiona. She liked lizards. That’s all. She loved lizards. It wasn’t important why. Some girls liked kittens. Others liked dragons. Fiona liked lizards. She dressed them.

She kept them in a box. They hung things from them. They slept. They ate bugs. If they died her grandmother took them. Otherwise they stayed on display. They came for snacks. They liked to eat lizards. That’s why they lived there.

When they didn’t like it they flew away. Never came back. Fiona made them posters. They weren’t happy about posters. She wrote poems about them. They couldn’t read them. They got a new cage anyway.

Fiona was pretty smart. She knew they didn’t speak. They didn’t care about poems. She wrote another story though. It got printed. Everyone liked it. Maybe they liked her.

She got her own room. She didn’t get many lizards. Instead she got a
